title: Asuddensurgeinspotifypodcastepisodereleasespredictsincreasedstreamingdemandfortechaudioservices
thesis: Rapid growth in new podcast episodes signals rising user engagement and content consumption on tech streaming platforms. Higher podcast production typically leads to increased platform usage, benefiting technology streaming infrastructure and services.
signal_logic: If daily new podcast episodes increase by >20% compared to 7-day average
entry_exit: Entry: If daily new podcast episodes increase by >20% compared to 7-day average Exit: After 7 trading days or if episode growth falls below 10%
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use Spotify Podcast API (episode release counts) via api (daily).

schema.idea: A sudden surge in Spotify podcast episode releases predicts increased streaming demand for tech audio services.
schema.behavior: Rapid growth in new podcast episodes signals rising user engagement and content consumption on tech streaming platforms.

market_impact.rationale: Higher podcast production typically leads to increased platform usage, benefiting technology streaming infrastructure and services.

trade_logic.entry: If daily new podcast episodes increase by >20% compared to 7-day average
trade_logic.exit: After 7 trading days or if episode growth falls below 10%
